use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and user interfaces across various application types
Loading state handling during asynchronous operations like form submissions
Multi-style button system supporting primary, secondary, tertiary, error, and warning states
Accessible button interactions with keyboard navigation support and disabled states
ai_summary: A versatile, dark-themed button component from the shugar design system featuring multiple type variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, error, warning), size options (tiny to large), and shape configurations (square, circle, rounded). Supports loading states with spinner integration, full-width layout, custom prefix/suffix elements, and hover interactions. Built with Tailwind CSS and clsx for className management, designed for desktop and mobile platforms.
